path.description: Base path for the application. Defaults to /

port.description: Port the application listens on. Defaults to 8080 if not specified

body.description: Request body to send with health check requests

endpoint.description: Health check endpoint path or URL. Defaults to /

expected_status_codes.description: Expected HTTP status codes. Defaults to [200]

items.description: Expected HTTP status codes. Defaults to [200]

failure_threshold.description: Consecutive failures before marking unhealthy (1-10). Defaults to 3

additionalProperties.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in health check requests

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in health check requests

interval_seconds.description: Check interval in seconds (30-3600). Defaults to 60

method.description: HTTP method to use. Must be GET, POST, or HEAD. Defaults to GET

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain health check results (1-365). Defaults to 30

success_threshold.description: Consecutive successes before marking healthy (1-10). Defaults to 1

timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout in seconds (5-120). Defaults to 30

enabled.description: Whether the health check should be enabled

arch.description: CPU architecture. Valid values: amd64, arm64, unknown

os.description: Operating system identifier. Valid values: ubuntu, debian, centos, fedora, rhel, alpine, arch, opensuse, sles, amzn, ol, rocky, almalinux, raspbian, pop, mint, manjaro, kali, nixos, gentoo, void, slackware, clear-linux-os, unknown

body.description: Request body to send with health check requests

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to include in health check requests

method.description: HTTP method to use. Must be GET, POST, or HEAD
